Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class SalesStore

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SalesStore
public class SalesStore extends SObject

Java class for SalesStore complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="SalesStore">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ImplementorType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Location" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Location" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LocationId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
